steps.t: Banners of the Ufúrzrak clan can be found at Muru Azog, before the East-gate of Nud-mekhem at Azanulbizar. You should destroy the banners of the Ufúrz…
Banners of the Ufúrzrak clan can be found at Muru Azog, before the East-gate of Nud-mekhem at Azanulbizar. You should destroy the banners of the Ufúrz…
